title: Sugary Crunchy Ethiopian Salmon Salad
description: Sweet, crunchy salmon salad inspired by Ethiopian flavors, served on a bamboo tray for a midnight craving.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 200°C and line a bamboo tray with parchment paper.
Pat the salmon dry, then rub it with olive oil, berbere, honey, and lemon juice.
Bake the salmon for 12 minutes until it flakes easily with a fork.
While the salmon bakes, toast the sesame seeds in a dry skillet over medium heat until golden, then set them aside.
In a small bowl, mix the roasted chickpeas, lime zest, and a pinch of salt, then drizzle with lime juice and toss lightly.
Once the salmon is done, flake it into large cubes and arrange them on the bamboo tray.
Sprinkle the cilantro over the salmon, top with the chickpea mixture, then scatter the toasted sesame seeds and optional chili slices for crunch.
Serve immediately, optionally drizzling extra honey or lime for heightened sweetness.
